name: Vault Hunter's Relic
description: A unique Eridian relic that improves loot quality by reducing the weighting of common drops, which indirectly raises the odds of finding higher-rarity items. The effect is real, but modest, and its value depends heavily on whether you are willing to give up a stronger combat relic.
notes:
It was awarded through Premiere Club bonuses and is also included with the Mechromancer Pack.

Its effect stacks in co-op when multiple players equip one, and its loot modifier is fixed rather than randomly rolled. It cannot normally be traded or dropped.

If you swap it for a relic on the ground while your inventory is full, it can vanish. If that happens, you can make a new character to obtain another copy and move it through Claptrap's Secret Stash.

special.description: Improves the odds of finding uncommon and rarer items by reducing the weighting of common drops. The effect stacks across the team, though the benefit diminishes at the top end.

abilities: Increased chance of enemies dropping rare loot. ZAIBioN 4
